evals.prompt: Launch the agent dashboard so I can monitor my agent teams.
evals.expected_output: Starts the dashboard server and opens the browser
expectations: Runs node server.js from the agent-dashboard/app directory
Opens or instructs to open localhost:3847 in the browser
Does not try to build a new dashboard from scratch

evals.prompt: Show me what my agents are doing right now.
evals.expected_output: Launches the surveillance dashboard to monitor active agent teams
expectations: Recognizes this as a request for the agent dashboard
Starts the server with the correct command (node server.js)
Explains what the dashboard shows (agent roster, messages, task board)
